title: Add a single line "lint_ignore" verilator comment

features.name: single_line_lint_ignore_comment
features.description: Code should include a single-line comment with // verilator lint_ignore directive applied to just the line it occupies

features.name: lint_off_on_comment_pair
features.description: Code should include a lint_off/lint_on comment pair wrapping a signal declaration to suppress a specific warning
